title: CDAC – Project Manager and Senior Project Engineer – 15 Posts

basic_details.job_title: CDAC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 15 Project Manager and Senior Project Engineer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (CDAC) Recruitment 2026 for 15 posts of Project Manager and Senior Project Engineer. Candidates with BE/B-Tech, M.E./M.Tech, Ph.D, M.Sc can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 23-05-2026 and 30-05-2026. For detailed information please visit CDAC official website.

age_limit.age_details: Minimum 17.52 lakh per annum, based on relevant post-qualification experience, as per C-DAC norms (CTC includes benefits like medical reimbursement, PF, canteen subsidy, leave encashment, gratuity etc.)

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B-Tech or equivalent, Post Graduate degree in Science/Computer Application, M.E./M.Tech or equivalent, Ph.D.

salary_details.pay_scale: Minimum 17.52 lakh per annum for Project Manager, Minimum ₹10.11/-lakhs per annum for Senior Project Engineer
